timeseries.description: Get time series data for specified BLS series IDs

series_info.description: Get information about a specific series

cpi.description: Consumer Price Index - All Urban Consumers

notes.registration: Register for API key at https://data.bls.gov/registrationEngine/

rate_limits.unregistered: 25 queries per day, 10 years of data per query
rate_limits.registered_v1: 500 queries per day, 10 years of data per query
rate_limits.registered_v2: 500 queries per day, 20 years of data per query, net/percent calculations

notes.pagination: BLS API returns all data for the requested time period in a single response
notes.series_id_format: Series IDs are unique identifiers for specific data series (e.g., LNS14000000 for unemployment)
notes.data_frequency: Most series are monthly, some are quarterly or annual
notes.request_format: POST requests require JSON body with seriesid array and date range
